ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading instrument */,
  "indices" TEXT /* Name of the indices (e.g., AUS_200, ESP_35) */,
  "leverage" TEXT /* Margin requirement as a percentage */,
  "units_per_lot" INTEGER /* Number of units per lot */,
  "point_value" TEXT /* Point value per lot in respective currency */,
  "commission_usd" TEXT /* Commission fee in USD per trade */,
  "minimal_lot_size" TEXT /* Minimum lot size that can be traded */,
  "maximal_lot_size" TEXT /* Maximum lot size that can be traded */,
  "swap_short" TEXT /* Swap rate for short positions */,
  "swap_long" TEXT /* Swap rate for long positions */,
  "average_spreads" TEXT /* Average spreads for trades */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* The time when the market opens for trading this instrument */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* The time when the market closes for trading this instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last time the instrument's details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Account balance available for trading */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the trader registered on the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trader for quick communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the trader */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the trader is based */,
  "trading_experience" TEXT /* The trader's experience level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the trader logged into the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader initiating the session */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading instrument being traded */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "profit_loss" TEXT /* Profit or Loss made during the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the trading session */,
  "trading_volume" TEXT /* The total volume traded during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session in which the order was placed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Lot size of the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the order was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the order (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* The time the order was executed */,
  "fee" TEXT /* The fee charged for the order */,
  "leverage_used" TEXT /* The leverage used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading instrument associated with the commission */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Rate of commission applicable on trades */,
  "minimum_commission" TEXT /* The minimum commission charged for a trade */,
  "maximum_commission" TEXT /* The maximum commission charged for a trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swap_rates" (
  "swap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swap rate record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading instrument associated with the swap rate */,
  "swap_rate_short" TEXT /* Swap rate applicable for short positions */,
  "swap_rate_long" TEXT /* Swap rate applicable for long positions */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date from which the swap rates are effective */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* The date when the swap rates will be reviewed next */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swap_rates_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spreads" (
  "spread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spread record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading instrument associated with the spread */,
  "average_spread" TEXT /* Average spread for the instrument */,
  "min_spread" TEXT /* The minimum spread for the instrument */,
  "max_spread" TEXT /* The maximum spread for the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the spread was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spreads_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES trading_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
